name: mcp-ssh-bridge
description: Secure SSH bridge for AI-powered remote server management. 338 tools across 74 groups covering Linux, Windows, Docker, Kubernetes, and more.

data_reduction.description: Server-side output reduction to minimize token consumption. Each tool declares an OutputKind (RawText/Tabular/Json/Yaml/Auto) that determines which params apply. Call describe-tool or inspect the tool schema to see the exact Reduction Strategy per tool.

params.jq_filter: jq expression applied server-side to JSON output (Json/Auto kinds)
params.yq_filter: jq expression applied server-side to YAML output (Yaml/Auto kinds)
params.columns: Case-insensitive column filter for tabular output (Tabular/Auto kinds)
params.limit: Cap rows/array elements (all kinds except RawText)
params.output_format: 'json' (default) or 'tsv' for 60-80% token savings on list data
params.save_output: Persist full untruncated output to a file path

pagination.description: Truncated outputs return an output_id; call ssh_output_fetch output_id=<id> offset=<N> to retrieve the rest
